title: Workhorse and Motiv Electric Trucks Executed Definitive Merger Agreement
text: Workhorse Group and Motiv Electric Trucks executed a definitive merger agreement on August 15, 2025, combining to create a leading North American medium-duty electric truck OEM. The merger provides Workhorse access to Motiv's manufacturing capabilities and customer relationships with 10 of the largest commercial truck fleets in North America. Motiv's controlling investor provided significant financing capacity of up to $50 million in new debt financing. The companies expect to achieve at least $20 million of cost synergies by the end of 2026. The combined entity will have scalable manufacturing capabilities and advanced products positioned for growth in the commercial EV market.
